query: SELECT usr.id, usr.userId, usr.roleId, sr.name as roleName, u.name as userName FROM userSystemRoles usr JOIN systemRoles sr ON usr.roleId = sr.id JOIN users u ON usr.userId = u.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT usr.id, usr.userId, usr.roleId, sr.name as roleName, u.name as userName FROM userSystemRoles usr JOIN systemRoles sr ON usr.roleId = sr.id JOIN users u ON usr.userId = u.id;
